CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tenative ruling. PLAINTIFF MARK MOORBERG'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Proposed Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements of Proposition 65. Order and separate judgment signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
